itf-chartizate-api/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated source/target compiler configuration with the unified release flag for Java 9+ module system compatibility.
itf-chartizate-api/pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' options are deprecated in favor of 'release' in modern JDKs; while not strictly a compile error in all versions, using 'release' is the required standard for Java 21 to ensure correct class file version and API usage checks.

itf-chartizate-api/pom.xml.general_idea: Update JAXB dependency from javax.xml.bind to jakarta.xml.bind to align with Jakarta EE namespace migration.
itf-chartizate-api/pom.xml.why_exists: The javax.xml.bind package was removed from the JDK in Java 11 and the API namespace changed to jakarta.xml.bind in Jakarta EE 9+; using the old groupId/artifactId will result in ClassNotFoundException or compile errors if the code imports jakarta packages or if the old artifact is unavailable.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 11 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against Java 11 semantics, failing to utilize Java 21 features or enforce Java 21 compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of maven-compiler-plugin may not support the `--release 21` flag or may fail to compile code targeting Java 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok to a version that supports Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions may fail to process annotations or generate code correctly on Java 21 due to internal API changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade JaCoCo plugin to a version compatible with Java 21 bytecode.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JaCoCo versions cannot instrument or analyze bytecode generated by Java 21, leading to runtime errors during test coverage execution.

pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate JAXB dependency from javax.xml.bind to jakarta.xml.bind.
pom.xml.why_exists: The `javax.xml.bind` namespace is deprecated and removed in newer Java versions; Jakarta EE namespaces are the standard for modern Java applications.
